qa_pair.question: How many total support requests are currently in the system? Use the dashboard stats tool and report the totalRequests value.
What is the title of the support request with the earliest upcoming deadline? Use the upcoming deadlines tool with limit 1 and report the title.
How many support requests currently have the status "submitted" (awaiting provider review)? Use the list requests tool with status=submitted and count the results.
What is the most recent entry in the provider activity log? Use the recent activity tool with limit 1 and report the event type.
How many discount codes are currently active? Use the list discount codes tool and count the codes with status "active".
How many quotes have been sent but not yet accepted or rejected? Use the list quotes tool with status=sent and count the results.
How many message threads exist in the support system? Use the dashboard stats tool and report the messageThreads value.
What is the provider's current availability status? Use the get settings tool and report the availabilityStatus field.
How many requests in the triage inbox are overdue? Use the triage inbox workflow tool and count the items in the overdue array.
How many referrals have been recorded in the support system? Use the dashboard stats tool and report the referrals value.
